{
  "1:LEN": {

    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n from functools import lru_cache\r\n from typing import Optional\r\n \r\n from pydantic_settings import BaseSettings\r\n \r\n \r\n class Settings(BaseSettings):\r\n     \"\"\"Application configuration loaded from environment variables.\r\n \r\n     All services (API, worker, scheduler, CLI) share this configuration module.\r\n     \"\"\"\r\n \r\n     service_name: str = \"api\"\r\n \r\n     # Persistence\r\n     db_url: str = \"sqlite+aiosqlite:///REDACTED\"\r\n \r\n     # Redis / broker\r\n     redis_url: str = \"redis://localhost:6379/0\"\r\n     queue_default: str = \"default\"\r\n     consumer_group: str = \"workers\"\r\n \r\n     # Worker behaviour\r\n     worker_concurrency: int = 4\r\n     visibility_timeout_ms: int = 30_000\r\n     reclaim_interval_sec: int = 10\r\n \r\n     # Scheduler behaviour\r\n     scheduler_interval_sec: int = 5\r\n \r\n     # Backoff defaults\r\n     backoff_base_seconds: float = 1.0\r\n     backoff_multiplier: float = 2.0\r\n     backoff_cap_seconds: float = 60.0\r\n \r\n     # Observability\r\n     log_level: str = \"INFO\"\r\n     metrics_port: int = 9000\r\n \r\n     class Config:\r\n         env_prefix = \"MINIQUEUE_\"\r\n         case_sensitive = False\r\n \r\n \r\n @lru_cache(maxsize=1)\r\n def get_settings() -> Settings:\r\n     \"\"\"Return cached settings instance.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     return Settings()  # type: ignore[call-arg]\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "f7dada593ad2434a700eefc7b1c75573698ca4170deb0660758e71e6ab93547e",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n from typing import AsyncGenerator\r\n \r\n from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncEngine, AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker, create_async_engine\r\n \r\n from .config import get_settings\r\n from .logging import get_logger\r\n from .models import Base\r\n \r\n \r\n logger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"db\")\r\n \r\n _engine: AsyncEngine | None = None\r\n _session_factory: async_sessionmaker[AsyncSession] | None = None\r\n \r\n \r\n def get_engine() -> AsyncEngine:\r\n     global _engine\r\n     if _engine is None:\r\n         settings = get_settings()\r\n         _engine = create_async_engine(settings.db_url, future=True, echo=False)\r\n     return _engine\r\n \r\n \r\n def get_session_factory() -> async_sessionmaker[AsyncSession]:\r\n     global _session_factory\r\n     if _session_factory is None:\r\n         _session_factory = async_sessionmaker(\r\n             bind=get_engine(),\r\n             expire_on_commit=False,\r\n             autoflush=False,\r\n         )\r\n     return _session_factory\r\n \r\n \r\n async def init_db() -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Create database tables if they do not yet exist.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     engine = get_engine()\r\n     async with engine.begin() as conn:\r\n         await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)\r\n     logger.info(\"Database initialized\")\r\n \r\n \r\n async def get_session() -> AsyncGenerator[AsyncSession, None]:\r\n     \"\"\"FastAPI dependency / general async context manager for DB sessions.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     session_factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     async with session_factory() as session:\r\n         yield session\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "6af30d9af171a10ebc171cd2e64d00e0fe67b462b071ac120083b390bd796b2e",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import json\r\n import logging\r\n import sys\r\n from datetime import datetime, timezone\r\n from typing import Any, Dict\r\n \r\n from .config import get_settings\r\n \r\n \r\n class JsonFormatter(logging.Formatter):\r\n     \"\"\"Simple JSON log formatter with common correlation fields.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str:  # type: ignore[override]\r\n         base: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n             \"ts\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\r\n             \"level\": record.levelname,\r\n             \"logger\": record.name,\r\n             \"message\": record.getMessage(),\r\n         }\r\n \r\n         # Standard extras we care about, if present\r\n         for field in (\"service\", \"job_id\", \"stream_id\", \"consumer\", \"attempt\", \"state\"):\r\n             value = getattr(record, field, None)\r\n             if value is not None:\r\n                 base[field] = value\r\n \r\n         # Include arbitrary extra dict if provided\r\n         extra: Any = getattr(record, \"extra_fields\", None)\r\n         if isinstance(extra, dict):\r\n             base.update(extra)\r\n \r\n         return json.dumps(base, separators=(\",\", \":\"), sort_keys=False)\r\n \r\n \r\n def configure_logging(service: str) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Configure root logging for the given service.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     root = logging.getLogger()\r\n     if root.handlers:\r\n         # Already configured\r\n         return\r\n \r\n     root.setLevel(settings.log_level.upper())\r\n     handler = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)\r\n     handler.setFormatter(JsonFormatter())\r\n     root.addHandler(handler)\r\n \r\n \r\n def get_logger(name: str, *, service: str | None = None) -> logging.Logger:\r\n     \"\"\"Get a logger with a bound service name.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     logger = logging.getLogger(name)\r\n     if service is not None:\r\n         # Add service name via LoggerAdapter\r\n         return logging.LoggerAdapter(logger, {\"service\": service})  # type: ignore[return-value]\r\n     return logger\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "1bb409d2cff4e7a713f61b58b0dc379c32279fbd78de3381eeb2430e6fa00b3d",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n from typing import Dict\r\n \r\n from prometheus_client import Counter, Gauge, Histogram\r\n \r\n JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL = Counter(\r\n     \"jobs_enqueued_total\",\r\n     \"Total number of jobs enqueued\",\r\n     labelnames=(\"type\", \"queue\"),\r\n )\r\n \r\n JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL = Counter(\r\n     \"jobs_started_total\",\r\n     \"Total number of jobs started\",\r\n     labelnames=(\"type\",),\r\n )\r\n \r\n JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL = Counter(\r\n     \"jobs_finished_total\",\r\n     \"Total number of jobs finished by terminal state\",\r\n     labelnames=(\"type\", \"state\"),\r\n )\r\n \r\n JOB_DURATION_SECONDS = Histogram(\r\n     \"job_duration_seconds\",\r\n     \"Job execution duration in seconds\",\r\n     labelnames=(\"type\",),\r\n     buckets=(0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0, 10.0, 30.0, 60.0),\r\n )\r\n \r\n QUEUE_DEPTH = Gauge(\r\n     \"queue_depth\",\r\n     \"Approximate depth of job queues\",\r\n     labelnames=(\"queue\",),\r\n )\r\n \r\n WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL = Counter(\r\n     \"worker_reclaims_total\",\r\n     \"Total number of jobs reclaimed from pending entries list\",\r\n )\r\n \r\n SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL = Counter(\r\n     \"scheduler_enqueues_total\",\r\n     \"Total number of scheduler enqueues\",\r\n     labelnames=(\"schedule_id\",),\r\n )\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "f92283155cbdc873be2502f1cdfeaf80628ecc6c53dd7acbfd76808acb3add89",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
